rationale: Equivalence theorem (==) over the renaming substitution; the asserted logical equivalence makes def:log-equiv load-bearing and it was missing (same convention as 0037/0040). def:free-for (the no-capture side condition) and def:subst-notation (phi[y/x]) are correctly present.
notes: Candidate edges not proposed: the theorem ranges over both quantifier forms (forall x phi == forall y phi[y/x] and the exists analogue), so def:universal-q/def:existential-q are arguable load-bearing constituents; left unproposed since the substitution machinery (free-for + subst-notation) is the operative content and the quantifier forms read as the ambient setting. 'no capture is introduced' is already encoded by def:free-for.
